role: Central GitHub configuration directory for the ArchSpine project, providing issue templates, a pull request template, dependency update automation, and CI/CD workflows.
responsibility: Collectively, this directory standardizes contributor interactions, automates dependency management, enforces code quality and testing, deploys documentation, manages package releases, and maintains repository hygiene through automated workflows and templates.

children.role: This directory contains GitHub issue templates for the ArchSpine project, providing structured forms for bug reports, feature requests, documentation improvements, and issue template configuration.
Automated dependency update configuration for ArchSpine, ensuring dependencies are kept current with minimal manual intervention.
Standardized template for submitting pull requests to the ArchSpine project.

This directory contains the automated workflow configurations that drive the CI/CD pipeline, documentation deployment, package release, architecture compliance checks, and issue management for the ArchSpine project.
